institution.name: Universal Technology College of Puerto Rico

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Universal Technology College of Puerto Rico fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (16.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 14 pp at Universal Technology College of Puerto Rico vs the 2018–2022 baseline (54.9% vs 69.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Universal Technology College of Puerto Rico rose 40% between 2006 and 2009 (1.3k → 1.8k).
